'''Twin Suns Squadron''' was an elite [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that was formed during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] occupation of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] at the height of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Created by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and named after his homeworld of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], command was given over to [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], who led the squadron to successful campaigns at [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], [[Galantos]], and [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. It primarily consisted of [[T-65XJ X-wing starfighter]]s, and second-in-command [[Jagged Fel]]'s [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|clawcraft]].

After the Yuuzhan Vong War, Twin Suns Squadron was decommissioned, but [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] often gave the designation to ad hoc squadrons assembled for various single missions. The prestigious name was later given to a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] squadron of [[X-83 TwinTail starfighter]]s during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. By [[138 ABY]] its leader was [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tobias Sun]].

{{Military-stub}}

==Members==

[[File:JagJainaSmoochCrop-Suvudu.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Jag Fel wearing the Twin Suns Squadron insignia on his flight suit]]
Twin Suns Squadron under the leadership of Luke Skywalker:

*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]: Twin Suns Leader
*[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]: Twin Suns Two
*[[Mara Jade Skywalker]]: [[Twin Suns Three]]
*[[Zindra Daine]]: Twin Suns Four
*[[Tilath Keer]]: Twin Suns Eleven
Twin Suns Squadron under the leadership of Jaina Solo
*[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]: Twin Suns Leader
*[[Kyp Durron]]: Twin Suns Two
*[[Jagged Fel]]: Twin Suns Three
*[[Zindra Daine]]: Twin Suns Four
*[[Voort saBinring]]: Twin Suns Five
*[[Alema Rar]]: Twin Suns Six - By the final year of the Yuuzhan Vong War, Rar was fighting in Twin Suns Squadron itself, under the command of Jaina Solo
*[[Twin Suns Seven]]
*Jaina Solo: alternate identity during the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]]: Twin Suns Nine
*[[Sharr Latt]]: Twin Suns Ten
*[[Tilath Keer]]: Twin Suns Eleven
*[[Beelyath]]: Twin Suns Twelve
*[[Pastav Rone]]
